title: Example Project
oneLiner: A placeholder intake project used to validate repository workflows.
summaryShort: This example project demonstrates the folder structure and naming required by the portfolio ingestion system.
summaryMedium: This example project demonstrates the folder structure and naming required by the portfolio ingestion system. Created as a seed project while setting up the long-term portfolio architecture.
summaryLong: This example project demonstrates the folder structure and naming required by the portfolio ingestion system. Created as a seed project while setting up the long-term portfolio architecture. Define conventions that let agents process new work without manual cleanup each time. This example project demonstrates the folder structure and naming required by the portfolio ingestion system. Standardized folder names, media naming patterns, and a structured narrative template. Agents can parse metadata, map media, and generate project JSON consistently.
